message:
feat(setup): add install plan computation + remediation guidance (bd-2gkx.8)

New install-plan.service.ts computes manifest-driven install plan diff
(installed/missing/optional_missing/error), generates phase-ordered
remediation steps with install commands, docs links, verify commands,
sudo/interactive notes, and copyable bash install script. 19 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
